headline: Howmet Aerospace to Participate in the Bank of America Global Industrials Conference
summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE: HWM) announced today that John C. Plant, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, will participate in the Bank of America Global Industrials Conference in London, UK, on March 17, 2026, at 5:40 AM ET.
